context: Tests whether the agent implements brute-force login protection using the correct Upstash/Redis packages with the exact rate limit thresholds, progressive delay values, email normalization, and user-enumeration-safe error handling as prescribed by the skill.

checklist.name: Upstash ratelimit package
checklist.description: Imports from '@upstash/ratelimit' (not a different rate-limit library)

checklist.name: Upstash Redis package
checklist.description: Imports from '@upstash/redis' and uses Redis.fromEnv() to initialize the client

checklist.name: Sliding window algorithm
checklist.description: Uses Ratelimit.slidingWindow() (not fixed window or token bucket) for both limiters

checklist.name: Per-IP limit threshold
checklist.description: Per-IP limiter is configured with exactly 20 attempts per 15-minute window

checklist.name: Per-account limit threshold
checklist.description: Per-account limiter is configured with exactly 5 attempts per 15-minute window

checklist.name: Rate limiter prefixes
checklist.description: IP limiter uses prefix 'rl_login_ip' and email limiter uses prefix 'rl_login_email'

checklist.name: Parallel limit checks
checklist.description: Both IP and account rate limit checks are executed concurrently (e.g. via Promise.all) rather than sequentially

checklist.name: Progressive delay thresholds
checklist.description: Progressive delay returns 0ms for 0 failures, 1000ms for less than 3 failures, 3000ms for less than 5 failures, and 5000ms for 5 or more failures

checklist.name: Failure TTL
checklist.description: Login failure counter is stored with a TTL/expiry of 900 seconds (15 minutes)

checklist.name: Email normalization
checklist.description: Email address is lowercased before being used as a rate limit key or failure-tracking key

checklist.name: User enumeration prevention
checklist.description: The same error message (e.g. 'Invalid credentials') is returned for both unknown-email and wrong-password cases — the response does NOT indicate which was wrong

checklist.name: No localStorage usage
checklist.description: The implementation does NOT reference localStorage or sessionStorage for storing any authentication token

checklist.name: Session fixation prevention mentioned
checklist.description: README or code comments mention session ID regeneration after successful login to prevent session fixation

checklist.name: Distinct error types
checklist.description: Rate limit errors distinguish between IP-blocked and account-locked conditions (different error codes or messages)
